consent.title: Photo consent and authenticity
consent.summary: Before continuing, please confirm how your photos can be used and that your submissions are authentic.
points: Your uploaded photos may be used by CYCAT on social media and to showcase Earth Day Bingo impact.
All submissions must be original, taken by you, and not AI-generated or sourced online.
Submissions may be reviewed to verify authenticity and appropriate content.
consent.photoUseLabel: I allow CYCAT to use my uploaded photos on social media and in program communications.
consent.authenticLabel: I confirm my uploads are my own photos, not AI-generated, and not taken from the internet.
consent.note: You can proceed once the countdown finishes and both checkboxes are selected.

rules.title: Earth Day Bingo rules
rules.intro: Take on the challenge and make every action count. Each time you complete a row, column, or diagonal on your Earth Day Bingo board, you will earn one hour of volunteer credit (maximum 5), so the more you participate, the more you get back. Speed also has its rewards, and being among the first can give you a strong advantage. Every completed row, column, or diagonal increases your chances of winning, so plan strategically and see how many you can finish before time runs out.

sections.title: How the game works
bullets: Complete a bingo tile by doing the action and uploading a photo proof.
Each completed row, column, or diagonal earns one hour of volunteer credit (maximum 5).
Every completed row, column, or diagonal adds one raffle entry.
You can keep completing tiles to earn more entries.

sections.title: Bonus entries for completing a row
bullets: All additional completed rows (any participant): 1 entry each.
Each successful CYCAT referral adds one bonus raffle entry to the referring member.
Bonus entries (including first-completion and referral bonuses) are added at the end of the challenge, so the live ticket counter does not include them during gameplay.

sections.title: Prize eligibility
bullets: Prize winners must be 30 or below and reside in Canada.
Everyone is welcome to participate; participants over 30 are not eligible for prizes.

sections.title: Photo and authenticity policy
bullets: Uploaded photos must be original and taken by you.
AI-generated, edited from online sources, or copied images are not allowed.
Submissions may be reviewed for authenticity.

sections.title: Community expectations
bullets: No inappropriate behavior, photos, or usernames.
Be respectful in all submissions and interactions.
CYCAT may remove entries that violate these guidelines.

sections.title: Consent notice
bullets: By participating, you consent to CYCAT using submitted photos on social media and for program highlights.
Your uploads are required for completing tiles.
